head.title: Explore the Incomati basin
head.description: Live monitoring across dam, flow, rainfall, groundwater and water quality stations in the Incomati basin.

hero.title: Explore the Incomati basin in real time
hero.subtitle: A shared, area-level view of dam levels, river flows, rainfall, groundwater, water quality and active hazards across Mozambique, South Africa and Eswatini.

confidence.label: Data confidence
confidence.verifiedHelp: Reviewed and approved by a data manager.
confidence.provisionalHelp: Submitted but not yet reviewed — use with care.
confidence.unknownHelp: No reading available yet for this station.

map.title: Network map
map.subtitleOverview: All active stations across the basin.
map.empty: No stations to display for this layer.

module.historicalDescription: Daily basin-wide average across all reporting stations. Provisional values are included to show the live picture.
module.stationHistoricalDescription: Choose a station or tap a marker on the map to load the station-level history.
module.selectStationPrompt: Choose a station to view the detailed chart.

hazards.title: Active hazards by area
hazards.subtitle: Current hazard status published by INMACOM partners. Specific incident locations are intentionally not shown.

footer.providedBy: Data provided by INMACOM monitoring partners
